### IV. | EDUCATION FORMATS SUPPORTED

- Online courses (self-paced / cohort)
- PDF zines / printable toolkits
- Interactive video essays / lectures
- Modular syllabus templates
- Community-led live workshops or studios

### V. | ACTION ITEMS

- [ ] Design EDU_EXPORT.md template for each project
- [ ] Build index of teaching formats per field (e.g., Myth x Tech, Audio x Archive)
- [ ] Consider licensing or institutional partnership models for EDU content
